title: Read for structure
subtitle: See how the text is built.
overview: See how the text is built.
Module: Native Content Skills. B2 Med strengthens abstract discussion, source response, professional communication, precise style, revision, and independent output.

sections.title: B2 med focus
rows: Understanding structure helps you remember and respond to a text.
理解结构能帮助你记住并回应文本。
B2 Med frame: identify the point, notice tone and structure, extract useful language, and respond independently.
B2 Med 框架：识别观点、注意语气和结构、提取有用语言，并独立回应。
Describe the structure of a short text.
The text opens with a problem, gives two reasons, then ends with a practical suggestion. That structure makes the argument easy to follow.
这篇文本以问题开头，给出两个原因，然后用一个实际建议结尾。这个结构让论证容易跟上。

items.en: Understanding structure helps you remember and respond to a text.
items.zh: 理解结构能帮助你记住并回应文本。

items.en: B2 Med frame: identify the point, notice tone and structure, extract useful language, and respond independently.
items.zh: B2 Med 框架：识别观点、注意语气和结构、提取有用语言，并独立回应。

items.en: The text opens with a problem, gives two reasons, then ends with a practical suggestion. That structure makes the argument easy to follow.
items.zh: 这篇文本以问题开头，给出两个原因，然后用一个实际建议结尾。这个结构让论证容易跟上。

items.en: I will make the idea precise before I try to make it sound advanced.
items.zh: 我会先让意思准确，再尝试让它听起来高级。

items.en: A strong B2 answer usually includes a condition, a limitation, or a fair counterpoint.
items.zh: 强 B2 回答通常包括条件、限制或公平的反方观点。

items.en: If the wording feels too abstract, I will add one concrete example from real life.
items.zh: 如果措辞感觉太抽象，我会加入一个来自真实生活的具体例子。

items.en: I can revise my answer for logic, tone, and rhythm.
items.zh: 我可以从逻辑、语气和节奏上修改我的回答。

items.en: This lesson is complete only when I can use the idea in my own words.
items.zh: 只有当我能用自己的话使用这个想法时，这节课才算完成。

lines.speaker: A
lines.en: Describe the structure of a short text.

lines.speaker: B
lines.en: The text opens with a problem, gives two reasons, then ends with a practical suggestion. That structure makes the argument easy to follow.
lines.zh: 这篇文本以问题开头，给出两个原因，然后用一个实际建议结尾。这个结构让论证容易跟上。

lines.speaker: A
lines.en: Can you make the answer more precise or more concrete?
lines.zh: 你能让回答更准确或更具体吗？

lines.speaker: B
lines.en: Yes. I will narrow the claim, add one example, and mention one limitation.
lines.zh: 可以。我会缩小主张、加入一个例子，并提到一个限制。

items.en: Describe the structure of a short text.
Answer once in six sentences with a clear structure.
items.zh: 用六句话做一次结构清楚的回答。

items.en: Add one B2 phrase such as that said, in practice, arguably, or the real issue is.
items.zh: 加入一个 B2 短语，比如 that said、in practice、arguably 或 the real issue is。

items.en: Record the answer, then rewrite the strongest sentence more naturally.
items.zh: 录下回答，然后把最强的一句改得更自然。

items.en: Use the revised sentence tomorrow in a different topic.
items.zh: 明天在不同话题中使用修改后的句子。
